name: agy
description: Google Antigravity CLI for terminal-based agent orchestration.

installs.notes: Installs the official Google Antigravity CLI cask and links the agy binary.
Installs the Antigravity IDE cask as an alternative if the user wants the full desktop app.
No universal Linux package-manager command is seeded yet. Open the official Google Antigravity CLI download page and follow the platform-specific installer.
Opens the official Google Antigravity CLI download page. Use the Windows installer from Google, then open a new PowerShell and verify agy --version.

commonFailures: Antigravity packaging differs by platform; prefer official Google download pages when a package manager entry is not available.
On macOS, Homebrew links the CLI as agy, not antigravity.
After installing a desktop/GUI package, open a new terminal before verifying PATH.
